§ 01Introduction

Dear {{recipientName}},

{{introductionParagraph}}

§ 02How We Help

Forhemit is a transition stewardship firm that specializes in helping business owners explore employee ownership as a succession strategy. We work with companies typically generating $3M-$30M in revenue where the owner is considering retirement, a strategic exit, or a legacy transition.

Our approach is different from traditional M&A advisory. We do not represent buyers. We represent the transaction itself -- ensuring that the deal is structured fairly, the employees are protected, and the seller achieves their financial and personal objectives.

01Full-service stewardship. We manage the entire ESOP transaction from qualification through closing and into the first year of post-close operation.
02Aligned incentives. Our fee structure is tied to successful closing, not to inflating valuations or pushing deals that should not close.
03Post-close commitment. We stay engaged after closing to ensure the ESOP operates as intended and the company thrives under employee ownership.
§ 03Next Steps

I would welcome the opportunity to learn more about {{companyName}} and discuss whether an employee ownership transition might be a fit. There is no cost or commitment for an initial conversation.

To schedule a brief introductory call, please:

A.Reply to this letter or email us at deals@forhemit.com
B.Visit forhemit.com to learn more about our approach
C.Reference {{ref}} in all correspondence so we can route your inquiry efficiently

I look forward to hearing from you.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
California Public Benefit Corporation
Authorized Representative
